title: Storybook coverage for kanbus_clock card variants
description: Add Storybook stories for Kanbus notification card layouts used by demos/kanbus_clock.py, including created/transition/comment/unknown, parent/no-parent, long-header, wrapping, and issue-type color variants.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Started implementation. Next: inspect current Storybook structure/components, then add a dedicated Kanbus card stories file grouped by event type + edge cases used in kanbus_clock.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented Storybook Kanbus card coverage: added reusable KanbusCard component + Pixoo/KanbusClockCards stories for created/transition/comment/unknown, parent/no-parent, long-header overflow, and issue-type color variants. Storybook build passes.
